sections.paragraph: ἀπέναντι [ἀπό, ἔναντι] adv. functioning as prep. w. gen. ‘in a position facing an entity’: of an object opposite Mt 27:61; Mk 12:41 v.l.; of pers. before Mt 27:24; Ac 3:16. The expression οὐκ ἔστιν φόβος ϑεοῦ ἀπέναντι τῶν ὀφϑαλμῶν αὐτῶν there is no fear of God before their eyes means that evidence of God’s immediate presence does not terrify the ungodly Ro 3:18. As marker of hostility or opposition against, contrary to Ac 17:7.
